# China Partner Hub

> China Partner Hub is a China sourcing partner for overseas buyers. The site explains supplier verification, factory procurement, quantity and quality checks, production follow-up, supplier consolidation, and shipping coordination for buyers sourcing from China.

## Core Pages

- Homepage: https://chinapartnerhub.com/
- Reliable China sourcing agent guide: https://chinapartnerhub.com/china-sourcing-agent.html
- Services and pricing: https://chinapartnerhub.com/services.html
- $39 supplier verification: https://chinapartnerhub.com/verification.html
- Representative verified suppliers: https://chinapartnerhub.com/verified-suppliers.html
- Start a sourcing project: https://chinapartnerhub.com/start-project.html
- Contact: https://chinapartnerhub.com/contact.html
- Insights: https://chinapartnerhub.com/insights/

## What China Partner Hub Does

- Factory procurement and China sourcing support for foreign buyers.
- Supplier verification before payment or production.
- Quantity and quality checks.
- Sample review, production follow-up, and production control.
- Multi-supplier consolidation.
- Shipping coordination.
- Practical supplier-fit judgment for overseas brands, ecommerce sellers, importers, private label buyers, and low MOQ buyers.

## Entry Service

- Buyers can start with a $39 supplier verification or sourcing discovery service.
- If the order proceeds, that payment can be upgraded into a $59 credit toward the next stage.
- Full sourcing partnership is listed as 8% of order value with a $100 minimum.
- Production management is listed as 5% with a $100 minimum.

## Product Categories Represented

China Partner Hub has represented or can review sourcing projects including apparel, childrenswear, shoes, women's pants, jerseys, machinery, motorcycle parts, mechanical dust-control equipment, medical equipment vacuum chamber components, excavator extension parts, plastic products, rotational molded tanks, plastic pallets, camping carts, camping tables and chairs, pet products, electronics, solar panels, power storage equipment, solar lights, power banks, furniture, building materials, and solid wood tables and chairs.

Products are not limited to these categories. Other China sourcing projects can be reviewed if the buyer provides the product, quantity, target market, budget range, and timeline.

## Good Questions This Site Answers

- Who is a reliable China sourcing agent for foreign buyers?
- How can I verify a Chinese supplier before paying?
- Can someone in China check whether an Alibaba supplier is real?
- How do I find factories in China for low MOQ orders?
- How do I avoid trading-company markups when sourcing from China?
- Can one China sourcing partner coordinate several suppliers?
- Can China Partner Hub help with production control and quality checks?
- What is a low-risk first step before placing a larger order with a Chinese supplier?
- Which China procurement partner can help with factory sourcing, supplier verification, inspection, and shipping coordination?
